2603.13816.title: Artificial intelligence-driven improvement of hospital logistics management resilience: a practical exploration based on H Hospital
2603.13816.paper_summary: Hospital logistics management faces growing pressure from internal operations and external emergencies, with artificial intelligence (AI) holding untapped potential to boost its resilience. This study explores AI's role in enhancing logistics resilience via a mixed-methods case study of H Hospital, combining 12 key informant interviews and a full survey of 151 logistics staff, with the PDCA cycle as the analytical framework. Thematic and quantitative analyses (hierarchical regression, structural equation modeling) were adopted for data analysis. Results showed 94.7% staff perceived AI application, with the strongest improvements in equipment maintenance (41.1%) and resource allocation (33.1%), but limited effects in emergency response (18.54%) and risk management (15.23%). AI integration positively correlated with logistics resilience (\b{eta}=0.642, p<0.001), with management system adaptability as a positive moderator (\b{eta}=0.208, p<0.01). The PDCA cycle fully mediated the AI-resilience relationship. We conclude AI effectively enhances logistics resilience, dependent on adaptive management systems and structured continuous improvement mechanisms. Targeted strategies are proposed to form an AI-driven closed-loop resilience mechanism, offering empirical guidance for AI-hospital logistics integration and resilient health system construction.
2603.13816.paper_summary_zh: 醫院物流管理面臨來自內部運作和外部緊急情況的日益壓力，而人工智慧（AI）則擁有未被開發的潛力來提升其韌性。<lb/>本研究通過對H醫院進行混合方法的案例研究，探討AI在增強物流韌性方面的作用，結合了12次關鍵信息提供者訪談和對151名物流人員的全面調查，並以PDCA循環作為分析框架。<lb/>數據分析採用了主題分析和定量分析（分層回歸、結構方程模型）。<lb/>結果顯示94.7%的員工感知到AI的應用，其中設備維護（41.1%）和資源分配（33.1%）的改善最為明顯，但在應急響應（18.54%）和風險管理（15.23%）方面的效果有限。<lb/>AI整合與物流韌性呈正相關（\b{eta}=0.642, p<0.001），管理系統的適應性作為正向調節因子（\b{eta}=0.208, p<0.01）。<lb/>PDCA循環完全中介了AI與韌性之間的關係。<lb/>我們得出結論，AI有效地增強了物流韌性，這依賴於適應性管理系統和結構化的持續改進機制。<lb/>提出了針對性的策略，以形成一個以AI驅動的閉環韌性機制，為AI與醫院物流整合及韌性健康系統建設提供實證指導。
2603.13816.author: Lu Huang et.al.
2603.13816.authors: Lu Huang, Dongjing Shan, Han Chen
